Class DatabaseConnection

java.lang.Object
com.venueOps.lancastermusichallproject.database.DatabaseConnection
public class DatabaseConnection extends Object
This class connects the application to the database, handling the fetching, storing, deleting and updating of data
Version:
6.0 April 7 2025
Author:
Neil Daya, Meer Ali, Sania Ghori

  • Nested Class Summary

    Nested Classes
    Modifier and Type
    Class
    Description
    static class 
    DatabaseConnection.ClientInfo
    Helper class to store clientID and companyName Used while saving a booking and for contract details

    Closes the database connection

    Fetches all contracts to be displayed on the contracts screen

    Fetches all the events that belong to a booking for the view events tab in bookings overview

    Fetches events for the daily sheet

    • connection

      private static Connection connection

  • Constructor Details

    • DatabaseConnection

      public DatabaseConnection()

  • Method Details

    • getConnection

      public static Connection getConnection()
      Attempts to connect to the database using credentials from the .env
      Returns:
      the connection variable used to perform database operations

    • closeConnection

      public static void closeConnection()
      Closes the database connection

    • getEventsForUsageChart

      public static ArrayList<Event> getEventsForUsageChart(LocalDate start, LocalDate end)
      Fetches all events within a given time frame. Used in the Usage Chart
      Parameters:
      start - start of time frame
      end - end date of time frame
      Returns:
      list of events occurring between the start and end dates to be displayed on the usage chart

    • getEventsForDailySheet

      public static ArrayList<Event> getEventsForDailySheet(LocalDateTime date)
      Fetches events for the daily sheet
      Parameters:
      date - the date the database fetches events for, by default set to today's date
      Returns:
      list of events occurring on the date to be displayed on the daily sheet

    • getCompanyNames

      public static javafx.collections.ObservableList<String> getCompanyNames()
      Fetches all company names for the Client details tab in the New Booking screen
      Returns:
      list of company names to be displayed on the Client details tab

    • getClientDetails

      public static Client getClientDetails(String companyName)
      Fetches the client details for a given company
      Parameters:
      companyName - name of the company to get details for
      Returns:
      Client object containing all the client's details

    • saveBooking

      public static void saveBooking(Booking booking)
      Saves a booking to the database along with its Event information, Seating Configurations, Contract and Invoice Rolls back if unsuccessful
      Parameters:
      booking - the booking to be stored

    • upsertClient

      private static DatabaseConnection.ClientInfo upsertClient(Connection conn, Client client) throws SQLException
      Updates or inserts the Client table in the database depending on if their details already existed or not
      Parameters:
      conn - connection variable for the database
      client - client object to be updated or inserted
      Returns:
      ClientInfo object containing clientID and companyName to be used when saving the booking
      Throws:
      SQLException

    • insertClient

      private static DatabaseConnection.ClientInfo insertClient(Connection conn, Client client) throws SQLException
      Inserts the given Client into the database
      Parameters:
      conn - connection variable for the database
      client - client object to be inserted
      Returns:
      ClientInfo object containing clientID and companyName to be used when saving the booking
      Throws:
      SQLException

    • updateClient

      private static void updateClient(Connection conn, int clientID, Client client) throws SQLException
      Updates the details of the given Client to its new details
      Parameters:
      conn - connection variable for the database
      clientID - unique identifier for the client
      client - client object containing the new details
      Throws:
      SQLException

    • insertContract

      private static int insertContract(Connection conn, int clientID, BigDecimal totalPrice, LocalDate signedDate) throws SQLException
      Inserts a booking's contract into the database
      Parameters:
      conn - connection variable for the database
      clientID - unique identifier for the client
      totalPrice - total price of the booking
      signedDate - date the contract was made
      Returns:
      the contract id to be saved with the booking
      Throws:
      SQLException

    • insertInvoice

      private static void insertInvoice(Connection conn, int bookingId, BigDecimal totalPrice) throws SQLException
      Inserts an invoice into the database into the database
      Parameters:
      conn - connection variable for the database
      bookingId - unique identifier for the booking
      totalPrice - total price of all the events in the booking
      Throws:
      SQLException

    • insertEvents

      private static void insertEvents(Connection conn, List<IEvent> events, DatabaseConnection.ClientInfo clientInfo) throws SQLException
      Inserts the given booking's events into the database
      Parameters:
      conn - connection variable for the database
      events - list of events to be stored
      clientInfo - client who hired the venue
      Throws:
      SQLException

    • insertSeatingConfig

      private static int insertSeatingConfig(Connection conn, SeatingConfig seatingConfig) throws SQLException
      Inserts an event's seating configuration into the database
      Parameters:
      conn - connection variable for the database
      seatingConfig - seating configuration object containing seating information
      Returns:
      seating configuration unique identifier to be used to link to the event
      Throws:
      SQLException

    • insertRestrictedViews

      private static void insertRestrictedViews(Connection conn, int seatingConfigId, javafx.collections.ObservableList<String> restrictedViews) throws SQLException
      Inserts all restricted seats belonging to a given seating configuration into the database
      Parameters:
      conn - connection variable for the database
      seatingConfigId - unique identifier to link a restricted seat to the seating configuration it belongs to
      restrictedViews - list of seats with restricted views
      Throws:
      SQLException

    • getBookings

      public static List<Booking> getBookings()
      Fetches all bookings
      Returns:
      list of all bookings to be used in the calendar and bookings overview

    • getEventsForBooking

      private static List<IEvent> getEventsForBooking(Connection conn, int bookingID) throws SQLException
      Fetches all the events that belong to a booking for the view events tab in bookings overview
      Parameters:
      conn - connection variable for the database
      bookingID - unique identifier for a booking
      Returns:
      list of events belonging to a booking
      Throws:
      SQLException

    • getVenuesForInvoice

      public static List<VenueTable> getVenuesForInvoice(int bookingId)
      Fetches all venues for a given invoice for the invoice page
      Parameters:
      bookingId - unique identifier for the given invoice
      Returns:
      list of all venues for the given invoice

    • getInvoices

      public static List<InvoiceInfo> getInvoices()
      Fetches all invoices to be displayed on the invoices screen
      Returns:
      list of invoices

    • getContracts

      public static List<ContractInfo> getContracts()
      Fetches all contracts to be displayed on the contracts screen
      Returns:
      list of contracts

    • updateBookingStatus

      public static void updateBookingStatus(int bookingID, String newStatus) throws SQLException
      Updates a booking's status to the given status string
      Parameters:
      bookingID - unique identifier for a booking
      newStatus - status that the booking's status will change to
      Throws:
      SQLException

    • getReviewsForEvent

      public static List<ReviewsInfo> getReviewsForEvent(int bookingId, int eventId)
      Fetches all the reviews for an event from the database
      Parameters:
      bookingId - unique identifier for a booking
      eventId - identifier to determine which event to get reviews for
      Returns:
      list of reviews to be displayed on the reviews screen

    • getAllEvents

      public static List<Event> getAllEvents()
      Fetches all events from the database
      Returns:
      list of events to be displayed on the reviews screen so user can pick an event to view reviews for

    • getDiaryNotes

      public static HashMap<String,String> getDiaryNotes(LocalDate timeframeStart, LocalDate timeframeEnd)
      Gets all diary notes from within a given time frame
      Parameters:
      timeframeStart - start date of time frame
      timeframeEnd - end date of time frame
      Returns:
      HashMap mapping the date to its note

    • saveDiaryNote

      public static void saveDiaryNote(DiaryNote diaryNote)
      Stores a given note in the database
      Parameters:
      diaryNote - the note to be stored

    • deleteNote

      public static void deleteNote(DiaryNote diaryNote)
      Deletes a given note from the database
      Parameters:
      diaryNote - the note to be deleted
